1032.issue: [W1032] Many "common.news" found in [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/blob/master/io-package.json). Repository builder will truncate at 7 news. Please remove old news.

2002.issue: [W2002] Version of [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/blob/master/package.json) (1.8.1) doesn't match latest version on [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.midea) (1.8.0)

2004.issue: [E2004] Versions "1.8.1, 1.7.0, 1.6.2, 1.6.1" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/blob/master/io-package.json) do not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.midea). Please remove from news section.

3022.issue: [E3022] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 1.8.1 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

3035.issue: [W3035] Workflow "test-and-release.yml" run triggered by tag "v1.8.0" for npm latest release 1.8.0 failed [run #360](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/actions/runs/26371595600).

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "os" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:os" instead.

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (lib/midea/devices/commercialac.js). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#270] "[iobroker-bot] Update Dependabot Configuration – Add npm Cooldown"](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/issues/270)

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "github-actions" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.midea/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
